title: Key interest rate: Lookup tool
summary: This page is an interactive lookup tool that allows users to query historical Bank of Canada key interest rate data, but it contains no current rate data, announcements, or substantive content itself. The tool explains that the key interest rate has been the target for the overnight rate since 2001, set at the midpoint of the operating band.
key_points: The key interest rate is the target for the overnight rate, set at the midpoint of the Bank's operating band
Prior to 2001, the key interest rate was the Bank Rate
The Bank Rate still exists and is currently set at the top of the operating band
This page is a lookup interface tool, not a data or announcement source
No current interest rate data is provided on this page
why_it_matters: This page is not useful for macro catalyst or market structure research as it contains no substantive data, analysis, or current information. It is a utility page that explains how to query rate history.
market_structure_context: Provides basic definition of Bank of Canada's operating band structure: key rate is midpoint, Bank Rate is top of band. This is background institutional knowledge, not new market structure information.

issues_found: Source is an interactive lookup tool/utility page with no substantive content, announcements, or research value
